_comment: fak forge-side trunk-law mirror (GitHub Repository Ruleset). The client hooks in tools/githooks/ are best-effort and bypassable (--no-verify, core.hooksPath, shell-laundering); a forge ruleset evaluates the ref update SERVER-SIDE, after all laundering has collapsed into a concrete <old-sha> <new-sha> <refname>, so no client flag can disarm it. Apply with tools/forge-rulesets/apply.sh. Mirrors: OFF_TRUNK / no-force-push / no-delete on main, linear history, and (where the fleet runs CI) required status checks + signatures. Edit `repository` and the status-check contexts to match your repo before applying.
name: fak-trunk-laws
